race.comment: Tricky. JUST JENNI (9) is racing consistently without winning, right in the market at Caulfield Heath last time in a small field when just battling away. Up to 2025m here can suit. SO SUAVE (5) is another going well without getting the job done, good to the line in his past couple in slowly run affairs. He wants a truer test than that. PURLER PATCH (11) has placed at his past couple and might look to roll forward from out wide. Including. TACTFULL (3) was okay in the Stony Creek Cup last time, rough chance. PRESLEY (7) finished sixth last start at Kyneton over 1862m. Fitter and could be value at odds.
